summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MatchMe app after background job worker, Stripe webhooks, and frontend pricing/dashboard updates. Backend APIs 91% passing (21/23 tests). Frontend working correctly with proper tier display, navigation, and no notification toggles.

minor.issue: Returns 500 - Stripe API key is invalid (sk_live_... key not valid). This is expected for preview environment.
minor.priority: LOW - Stripe integration code is correct, just needs valid API key

minor.issue: Accepts empty comment string - should validate comment is not empty

issues: Shows 'Results delivered within 24 hours' for Pro user - should show '2-4 hours' based on tier

passed_tests: API health endpoints (/api/ and /api/health) working
User registration creates account with 3 credits, correct response fields
Admin login works with correct credentials (admin@matchme.com / AdminMatch2024!)
Dashboard API returns correct tier info for Pro users (unlimited, 10+ reviewers, 4hr time cap)
Dashboard API returns correct tier info for Free users (3 credits, 3 reviewers, 24hr time cap)
Job creation POST /api/jobs/best-shot validates 3-10 photos requirement
Job creation POST /api/jobs/profile-analysis validates 4-6 photos requirement
Pro users can create jobs without credit check
Free users have credits deducted (1 for best-shot, 2 for profile-analysis)
Insufficient credits blocks job creation for free users
Admin run-worker endpoint requires admin role
Admin can trigger job worker successfully
Stripe webhook endpoint exists and responds
Invalid Stripe package rejected
Frontend Landing page renders with CTA buttons
Frontend Pricing page shows 3 tiers correctly: Free ($0/forever), Priority ($9/month), Pro ($25/month)
Frontend Pricing page shows correct features for each tier
Frontend login flow works - redirects to dashboard after successful login
Frontend Dashboard shows correct credit badge (Unlimited for Pro, credits for Free)
Frontend Dashboard shows correct tier info without notification toggles
Frontend Dashboard navigation to best-shot, profile-analysis, rate, pricing pages works
Frontend Waiting page shows correct tier-specific time (2-4 hours for Pro)
Frontend Waiting page shows correct reviewer count (10+ for Pro)
action_items: Replace Stripe API key with valid test/live key for payment functionality
Consider adding comment validation in /api/rate/submit to require non-empty comment
Best Shot page shows '24 hours' for all users - should be tier-specific
critical_code_review_comments: Background job worker logic (lines 918-1156) correctly implements weighted formula and tier-based processing
Stripe webhook handlers (lines 1272-1351) correctly handle subscription.created, invoice.paid, subscription.deleted events
Email notifications via Resend are properly implemented (lines 160-283)
Pro users correctly bypass credit system in job creation and rating
TIER_CONFIG correctly defines Free (3 reviewers, 24hr), Priority (7 reviewers, 4hr), Pro (10 reviewers, 4hr)
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup with 999 credits, pro tier, admin role
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs are working correctly. Stripe integration code is correct but API key is invalid for preview environment. Frontend login flow now works (was broken in iteration_3). All tier configurations are correct. Background job worker runs every 15 minutes. No in-app notification UI exists (email-only via Resend).

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are live (MongoDB Atlas, Cloudinary, Stripe, Resend). Stripe API key is invalid but code is correct.
